scripts.dev: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run dev watch --concurrency=20'
scripts.dev:php: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run dev:php --filter=@wgw/dev-server'
scripts.dev:ui:watch: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run watch --filter=@wgw/admin-ui --filter=@wgw/drive-ui --filter=@wgw/voice-ui --filter=@wgw/mail-ui --filter=@wgw/user-settings-ui --filter=@wgw/install-ui'
scripts.build: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run build'
scripts.setup:macos: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; pnpm --filter @wgw/wegotworkspace setup:macos'
scripts.preview:macos: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; pnpm --filter @wgw/wegotworkspace preview:macos'
